Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mildly low fasting glucose, low HDL cholesterol, and elevated LDL cholesterol, which increase cardiovascular risk. HbA1c is normal, indicating good long-term glucose control. Renal function and electrolytes are normal, and there is no evidence of microalbuminuria. Recommend addressing dyslipidemia and monitoring glucose.
